userRequest: First take everything in column B:B and match with every record in Sheet1!A:A, then take everything in column A:A and sum it based on corresponding Sheet1!B:B
summary: Match records from column B against Sheet1 column A using XLOOKUP, then create SUMIF formulas to aggregate values in column A grouped by Sheet1 column B categories.

steps.description: Read the active sheet data to understand the structure and row count
Match each value in column B against Sheet1 column A using XLOOKUP formulas
Read Sheet1 data to find unique categories in column B for grouping
Create SUMIF formulas to sum column A values grouped by their matching Sheet1 column B categories

warnings: Row count estimated at 100; actual data may be shorter or longer
XLOOKUP requires Excel 365 or Excel 2021+; falls back to VLOOKUP on older versions
Output ranges C:D and F:G assumed to be empty; existing data will be overwritten
